wan22_i2v.notes: Baseline. Requires wan_2.1_vae.safetensors and high/low GGUF two-stage.

ltx23_fp8.notes: Checkpoint installed; I2V workflow/conditioning verification still required.

ltx23_distilled.notes: GGUF installed; I2V workflow/conditioning verification still required.

wan22_t2v.notes: Category 5 only. Never score preservation against a source plate.

hunyuan15.notes: Sparse challenger; Phase 0 smoke required before bracket entry.

wan22_i2v_hi.notes: Quant ablation only. Need Q8/fp8/fp16 higher precision Wan2.2 I2V weights.

cogvideox15.notes: Long-clip probe only; not part of short realism grid.

notes: T2V entries are category 5 only and do not receive source-preservation scores.
wan22_i2v_hi and native-res are separate ablations, not main matrix cells.
Do not regenerate locked plates mid-test; replace only by creating benchmark_version v2.
